title: Vekkali Amman Temple
tagline: Vekkali Amman Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vekkali Amman Temple is a temple dedicated to the Goddess Vekkaali, a form of the goddess Kali.
overview.description: Vekkali Amman Temple is a temple dedicated to the Goddess Vekkaali, a form of the goddess Kali. It is located in Woraiyur, a neighbourhood in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India. The central shrine of the temple houses the image of Vekkali Amman and the major feature of the temple is the absence of roof over the sanctum. The temple is known from the period of early Cholas, but there are no historical records.

topPlaces.name: Azhagiya Manavala Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: Azhagiya Manavalan Perumal Temple (also called Thirukozhi or Nachiyar Koil) in Uraiyur, a suburb Tiruchirappalli in the south Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu God Azhagiya Manavalan (Vishnu) and Goddess Kamalavalli (Lakshmi). Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Divya Prabandha, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divyadesam dedicated to Lakshmi Narayana.

topPlaces.name: Uraiyur
topPlaces.description: Uraiyur (also spelt Woraiyur) is a locality in Tiruchirapalli city in Tamil Nadu, India. Uraiyur was the ancient name of Tiruchirappalli City.

topPlaces.name: Raghavendrapuram
topPlaces.description: Raghavendrapuram is the name of a place in India. There are at least two villages with the same name, one in Tamil Nadu and the other in Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Tiruchirappalli Fort
topPlaces.description: Tiruchirappalli Fort is a dilapidated fort in India which once protected the Old City of Trichy encompassing Big Bazaar Street, Singarathope, Bishop Heber School, Teppakulam and Tiruchirapalli Rock Fort. All that remains now is a railway station with that name and Main Guard Gate along West Boulevard Road in the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Chathiram Bus Station, Tiruchirappalli
topPlaces.description: Chathiram Bus Stand, Tiruchirappalli, old name Chinnaiya Pillai Chathiram also popularly known Chathiram Perundu Nilayam or Chathiram Bus Stand, is one of the bus termini of Trichy, other being the Central Bus Stand. The terminus is located in a land of 2.05 acres (0.83 ha) near Chintamani, adjacent to St.

topPlaces.name: Uyyakondan Thirumalai
topPlaces.description: Uyyakondan Thirumalai (also known as Karkudimalai and Thirumalainallur) is a suburb in the city of Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India. Uyyakondan Thirumalai gets its name from the hill lock located in the locality.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Tiruchirappalli
topPlaces.description: The Our Lady of Lourdes Church is located in the city of Tiruchirapalli in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Built in the Gallo-Catholic design, the Church is devoted to Our Lady of Lourdes.

image.alt: Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Tiruchirappalli

topPlaces.name: Uyyakondan Thirumalai Temple
topPlaces.description: Uyyakondan Thirumalai Temple (also called Ujeevanathar temple, Karkudimalai or Thirumalainallur)) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located on the banks of Uyyakondan river, Trichy, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Uyyakondan, and is represented by the lingam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vekkali Amman Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vekkali Amman Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vekkali Amman Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (9 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (5 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vekkali Amman Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vekkali Amman Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vekkali Amman Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vekkali Amman Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vekkali Amman Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Azhagiya Manavala Perumal Temple, Uraiyur, Raghavendrapuram, Tiruchirappalli Fort, Chathiram Bus Station, Tiruchirappalli.
